description.zh-Hans: 生成适用于RPG地面的可平铺鹅卵石，以独立石块、左上高光边、右下暗边和稀疏裂纹组织有限色阶。
description.en: Generates seamless RPG cobblestone tiles with distinct stones, top-left rim lights, bottom-right shadows, sparse cracks, and a limited palette.

triggers.zh-Hans: 鹅卵石, 石板路, 石铺地面, 街道, 中世纪
triggers.en: cobblestone, paving, flagstone, stone path, street

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成鹅卵石铺装纹理，用于街道、城堡或古风场景的地面材质。
exampleUsage.en: Generate a cobblestone paving texture for streets, castles, or ancient scene ground materials.
